div.div:
Traffic Flow: ❶ PSC endpoint (10.0.0.50) in consumer VPC ❷ PSC tunnel crosses VPC boundary ❸ Service Attachment receives traffic ❹ ILB (10.100.0.10) routes via URL Map ❺ Serverless NEG selects backend ❻ Cloud Run service
Pros: Strongest isolation, cross-org access control, approval-based, no VPN dependency, custom domains, full traffic control
Cons: Most complex setup, highest per-service cost (~$36/mo per group), ILB + SA per service group
